caption: A group of men gather in what appears to be a corridor or official building. Several men are dressed in casual button-down shirts and trousers, while others wear uniforms, including a man in a khaki police uniform. In the initial scene, a man in a grey shirt is seen in a close-up, surrounded by others. As the sequence progresses, the view widens to show the men walking and interacting in the hallway. The screen is overlaid with news graphics, including a red banner at the bottom and a red header. The header text reads "नीतीश का तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The bottom banner states "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजेन्द्र यादव". To the left, a portrait of a man is labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and on the right, smaller portraits are labeled "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी." A "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right corner, and the timestamp "10:03 PM" appears at the bottom.
